subject.primary: a colossal ancient Nephilim warrior in weathered bronze and crimson armor, face obscured by shadow, towering in foreground with one massive six-fingered hand reaching toward camera holding a glowing test tube filled with luminous red liquid
subject.secondary: behind the giant, a fully visible modern CRISPR genetics laboratory with test tubes containing bright red glowing liquid, gene sequencing screens, and petri dishes — all rendered in desaturated black-and-white except the red liquid which glows vividly
subject.focal_point: the glowing red test tube in the giant six-fingered hand, bridging ancient and modern

environment.location: a modern genetics laboratory with clinical equipment, monitors showing DNA sequences, all in desaturated monochrome except selective red accents
environment.time_of_day: artificial fluorescent lab lighting mixed with supernatural warm glow from the giant
environment.atmosphere: collision between ancient biblical horror and sterile modern science

composition.rule: giant occupies left 65 percent, laboratory stretches across background, right 30 percent has clean dark space for text
composition.foreground: Nephilim hand with test tube in vivid crimson and bronze tones
composition.midground: giant torso and armor in warm muted tones
composition.background: black-and-white laboratory with selective red glow from test tubes

lighting.key_light: harsh overhead fluorescent from the lab mixed with warm supernatural glow from the giant
lighting.fill_light: red glow from the test tube illuminating the six-fingered hand
lighting.rim_light: cold white lab light outlining the giant silhouette
lighting.mood: temporal shock — something ancient should not be in a modern lab

style.film_stock: Fujifilm Eterna 500 with clinical cold tones
style.post_processing: high contrast split toning — warm shadows cool highlights, selective color red, heavy film grain
style.texture_detail: weathered ancient armor texture against sterile clinical surfaces, molecular detail on screens

mood.emotion: temporal dissonance — ancient forbidden being in modern sterile environment

symbolism.primary: CRISPR as the modern Tower of Babel — humanity recreating what God destroyed

negative_as_positive: clean surface without any visible text or watermarks
anonymous figure without recognizable facial features, face hidden in deep shadow
tack-sharp focus on the test tube in the hand
naturalistic color grading with selective red accents on monochrome background

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: YouTube thumbnail. The warrior MUST have exactly SIX fingers on the hand holding the test tube. The laboratory must be clearly visible behind the giant with CRISPR equipment. Background lab is desaturated black-and-white, the giant and the red liquid in test tubes are in vivid color. Right 30% must be clean dark negative space for text overlay.
